sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC의 공시 핵심을 한국어로 요약했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 예비 연매출은 약 100억 6,000만 달러로 전년 83억 5,000만 달러 대비 21% 증가했습니다.
예비 4분기 매출은 약 28억 7,000만 달러로 전년 동기 24억 1,000만 달러 대비 19% 증가했습니다.
2025년 전 세계 시술량(다빈치·Ion)이 약 19% 증가했으며, 다빈치는 약 18%, Ion은 약 51% 성장했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 2025년 다빈치 수술 시스템 1,721대를 설치했으며, 이 중 다빈치 5 시스템이 870대로 전년 362대에서 크게 늘었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 회사는 2026년 전 세계 다빈치 시술량이 약 13~15% 증가할 것으로 전망했습니다.
예비 실적은 감사 전 수치로 최종 결산 절차에 따라 변동될 수 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 약 51%에 달한 Ion 시술량 고성장과 다빈치 5 전환이 2026년 13~15% 시술 성장 전망 달성을 좌우할 것입니다.
예비 수치인 만큼 최종 감사 결과와의 차이에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: 25 as compared with the fourth quarter of 2024, primarily driven by adoption of da Vinci 5 in the U.S. and continued growth in utilization in OUS markets. • Full year 2025 worldwide procedures (da Vinci and Ion combined) grew approximately 19% compared with 2024. Da Vinci procedures grew approximately 18% and Ion procedures grew approximately 51%. The Company expects worldwide da Vinci procedures to increase approximately 13% to 15% in 2026 as compared with 2025. • During the fourth quarter of 2025, the Company placed 532 da Vinci surgical systems, compared with 493 in the fourth quarter of 2024. The fourth quarter 2025 da Vinci surgical system placements included 303 da Vinci 5 systems, compared with 174 in the fourth quarter of 2024. During the fourth quarter of 2025, the Company placed 42 Ion endoluminal systems, compared with 69 in the fourth quarter of 2024. • During 2025, the Compa

ny placed 1,721 da Vinci surgical systems, compared with 1,526 systems in 2024. The 2025 da Vinci surgical system placements included 870 da Vinci 5 systems, compared with 362 in 2024. During 2025, the Company placed 195 Ion endoluminal systems, compared with 271 in 2024. • Preliminary fourth quarter 2025 revenue of approximately $2.87 billion increased by 19% compared with $2.41 billion in the fourth quarter of 2024. 24. The higher fourth quarter revenue was driven by growth in procedure volume, higher da Vinci system placements, and an increase in the installed base of systems. The Company expects 2025 revenue of approximately $10.06 billion, an increase of 21% compared with $8.35 billion in 2024. The unaudited results in this press release are preliminary and subject to the completion of the Company’s final closing procedures and annual independent audit and, therefore, are subject to adjustment.
